Where year go!?
last months 2014 feel like blur footy finals, Thanksgiving, facial hair.
companies hiring.
Always hiring.
2014 massive year RecruitLoop, journey transform recruiting make hiring easy.
want heartfelt thanks everyone played part Clients, Community, investors, advocates.
especially team (and their families), worked tirelessly throughout year make possible.
Before launch into year, quick pause reflect celebrate 2014, rearview.
Team people across countries, with 20,039 messages posted internal chat rooms (most them automated!).
offices, office pets.
We're mission bring transparency fairness process (and industry) recruiting everyone involved.
expanded platform 2014, launched some exciting features exactly that.
outside world, finding identifying best recruiter specific role almost impossible task.
We're solving that problem with detailed feedback ratings.
Now, every recruiter rated several criteria after every project: professionalism, responsiveness, efficiency, expertise value.
Clients also offer public (and private) comments review.
consumers, we're starting expect this type transparency almost every other profession.
it's unheard recruiters.
You'll seeing these ratings improved Recruiter Profiles early 2015.
carefully experience every verified recruiter Community.
part this references from recruiter's previous clients candidates.
Now, when recruiter reference, that referee must verify their comments using their LinkedIn credentials.
This ensures references recruiter's profile from real people, stand behind them.
clients demand transparency about potential Recruiters might work with.
delivered that 2014 with simple, cleaner view Proposals.
Now, clients view recruiters' proposal with single click, from device login required!).
They question, accept decline each proposal matter seconds.
internal development 2014 focused marketplace management platform.
This allows (amongst many things) much faster, more targeted matching between clients recruiters.
Now, when clients posts role, they receive only proposals from recruiters with specific, relevant experience often within minutes.
There's fancy screenshots this one.
only post role.
Infographics: True Cost Hiring.
Community lifeblood RecruitLoop.
grew thrived 2014 sometimes making, increasingly (and excitingly) with life own.
Tamara Blythman trip from Sydney Francisco!

hosted Community over dozen meetups (physical virtual) throughout 2014.
Some were purely social, brought people together.
professional development series also great feedback, with topics like Legendary Looper; Maximize your Consultant Mojo.
wasn't year smiles roses.
difficult many ways.
Like (every?)
startup, we've made mistakes learnt something every day.
grow grow company, hope we're constantly improving, based those sometimes painful lessons.
Doing many 'things that don't scale'.
followed famous advice.
tried address broken processes with human input.
carefully curated every element marketplace provide phenomenal service everyone involved.
reached point late year where this accumulation small decisions despite best intentions actually making harder scale.
This difficult realization; we're process streamlining automating many parts business, ensure have truly scalable model.
Some people don't like change.
Actually, tons people don't like change.
This obvious statement, something every innovation needs overcome.
it's sentiment felt different ways this year: strategic partnership that flopped soon after takeoff; another that close, fell just before finish line; some poorly disguised hacks critiques from disgruntled traditionalists.
Some these lessons hurt moment, have made stronger reflection.
We're unmoved resolve change status quo; better position with another year experience behind
Expanded Community.
Improved Profiles.
We'll rolling designs Community Profiles, capture depth specialization experience, display detailed performance metrics ratings.
improved
general, we'll progressively deploying dramatically improved, mobile-responsive user-experience both sides marketplace over coming months.
...Along with more can't share just now.
fantastic year.
Thank everyone played role.
We're looking forward serving with even bigger better changes throughout year ahead.
